popularStory.headline:
William Frost
(1495 – after 5 July 1549)
popularStory.description:
William Frost was born in England, probably at Glemsford, Suffolk, just before 1500. Around 1520, he married a woman whose name is unknown. 

William was a yeoman, or farmer, but he had extensive land …

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Frost II於1495年7月1日出生在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德時，他的父親William Frost25歲，母親Constance Hamerton19歲。他於1520年與Philippa Scott在英國英格蘭素福爾可素德波利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1549年9月15日在他的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Frost II于1495年7月1日出生在英国素福爾可格萊姆斯福德时，他的父亲William Frost25岁，母亲Constance Hamerton19岁。他于1520年与Philippa Scott在英国英格兰素福爾可素德波利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1549年9月15日在他的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Frost
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Danish, and Swedish: nickname for someone who suffers from being cold, or perhaps used in the sense ‘frosty, cold as frost, without warmth of feeling’, or perhaps ‘having the appearance of being covered with frost’ for one with white hair or a white beard. From Old English, Old High German, Old Norse frost ‘frost’.

variants.name: Chell
meanings: English (Staffordshire): from an unrecorded Middle English male or female personal name Chell(e) or Chele, Old English Cēolla, Cēol, or Cēola, short forms of names beginning with Cēol- ‘ship’, such as Cēolbeorht (male) and Cēolflǣd (female). Alternatively, perhaps a nickname from Middle English chele, chile (Old English cīele, cēle, cȳle) ‘cold, lacking sympathy’. Compare Frost .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When William Frost II was born on 1 July 1495, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, his father, William Frost, was 25 and his mother, Constance Hamerton, was 19. He married Philippa Scott in 1520, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 15 September 1549, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Frost II est né le 1 juillet 1495, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William Frost, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Constance Hamerton, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Philippa Scott en 1520, à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 15 septembre 1549, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Frost II am 1. Juli 1495 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Frost 25 und seine Mutter Constance Hamerton 19. Er hat 1520 in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Philippa Scott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 15. September 1549 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Frost II è nato il il 1 luglio 1495 nel Glemsford, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, William Frost, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Constance Hamerton, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Philippa Scott nel 1520, nel Sudbury, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 15 settembre 1549, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Frost IIが1495年7月1日にイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードで生まれた時，父William Frostは25歳，母Constance Hamertonは19歳であった。1520年にイギリスイギリススフォルクスドブリーでPhilippa Scottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1549年9月15日に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Frost II(이)가 1495년 7월 1일 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Frost(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance Hamerton(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 수드버이에서 Philippa Scott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1549년 9월 15일 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 July 1495–15 September 1549: 1 de julho de 1495–15 de setembro de 1549
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Frost II nasceu em 1 de julho de 1495, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Frost, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Constance Hamerton, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Philippa Scott em 1520, em Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1549, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Frost II родился 1 июля 1495 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William Frost было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance Hamerton, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa Scott в 1520 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 15 сентября 1549 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.

es.1 July 1495–15 September 1549: 1 de julio de 1495–15 de septiembre de 1549
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Frost II nació el 1 de julio de 1495, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Frost, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Constance Hamerton, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Philippa Scott en 1520, en Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1549, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años.
